TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sabato, title = sabato, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sabato} }

S.FORM: sabato kakilimaan i kaliking sohong sapicumud i ci widiyan, sabawcacay ku bangu a dadan, namakaamis tayda i timus ikawanan nu dadan, iayaw nu ciwidiyan a cacudadan, idaw kuni patideng tu salisinan sabatu sapikining tu pituway a tumuk. nilacul ŤĶ∑śļź Baetu u kamu nu Sakizaya, u sasalisin a buyu i sauwad nu sakidaya sabatu han, u imi sa, i sasa nu sauwac tanu batu sa. Sabatu hananay u tatabakiya a baetu masilat, yasasalisinan sabatu u sasalisidan nu ci winiyan a niyadu, u sakidaya a tamdaw masikad tu baetu, u baetu ani'tu patidaku, ina sasalisinan hanu baetuen misilad, u sangaw nu niyadu'ay atu di'tu, patineng tuni simsiman. ŚēüÁĒ®ŚĄÄŚľŹ Sabatu u salisinan nay i tusaay a malbud walu a mihcaan mahamin sangaan, sakidaya i tusa a malbud siway a mihcaan cacay a mulad samaw tu pitu a demiad, misalisin na panganga tusa tu amihcaan atu napatideng tu sasalisinan, uyda a demiad binawlan mipacuk tu tusay a pabu, pasimel tu titi, ina sasalisidan patideng hidan tunu cacay a malbud walu a lasubu pitu a bataan walu a mihcaan nu takumuwan a kawaw(kaliyawan a kawaw) u sakidaya masibek, papina-ay mueneng i kilay a mukelal nu tipan satimulan a tudi, ci widiyan a binawlan maluyaluy milakuud tu sauwad nu ci kasuwan atu talawadaw, miduduc tu sadipasan maytimulan mulaliw, makatukuh satu i ciwidiyan. ci widiyan a niyadu, a mikining tu papituway a tumuk, patideng satu tu baetu a paya atu sasalisidan. ŚÖęť°ÜŚ∑®Áü≥ Sabatu a sasalisidan walu ku ni patideng tu tatabakiyay a matu, mabali', malamec, lecuhan, matuduh, kasikad, malaluk, madimel, kadihiyi, ina sapitulun nama kayda i buyuay tuluway a kalimucu nu pildac ani pasubana.
S.PHON: sabato kakir~…ĺimaan i kar~…ĺikiŇč sońßoŇč sapi ¶umud i ¶i widijan, sabaw ¶a ¶aj ku baŇču a dadan, namakaamis tajda i timus ikawanan nu dadan, iajaw nu ¶iwidijan a ¶a ¶udadan, idaw kuni patid…ôŇč tu sar~…ĺisinan sabatu sapikiniŇč tu pituwaj a tumuk. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ** ba…ôtu u kamu nu sakizaja, u sasar~…ĺisin a buju i sauwad nu sakidaja sabatu ńßan, u imi sa, i sasa nu sauwa ¶ tanu batu sa. sabatu ńßananaj u tatabakija a ba…ôtu masir~…ĺat, jasasar~…ĺisinan sabatu u sasar~…ĺisidan nu ¶i winijan a nijadu, u sakidaja a tamdaw masikad tu ba…ôtu, u ba…ôtu ani Ē~ °tu patidaku, ina sasar~…ĺisinan ńßanu ba…ôtu…ôn misir~…ĺad, u saŇčaw nu nijadu Ē~ °aj atu di Ē~ °tu, patin…ôŇč tuni simsiman. **** sabatu u sar~…ĺisinan naj i tusaaj a mar~…ĺbud war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan mańßamin saŇčaan, sakidaja i tusa a mar~…ĺbud siwaj a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a mur~…ĺad samaw tu pitu a d…ômiad, misar~…ĺisin na paŇčaŇča tusa tu amińß ¶aan atu napatid…ôŇč tu sasar~…ĺisinan, ujda a d…ômiad binawr~…ĺan mipa ¶uk tu tusaj a pabu, pasim…ôr~…ĺ tu titi, ina sasar~…ĺisidan patid…ôŇč ńßidan tunu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺbud war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan nu takumuwan a kawaw(kar~…ĺijawan a kawaw) u sakidaja masib…ôk, papina-aj mu…ôn…ôŇč i kir~…ĺaj a muk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu tipan satimur~…ĺan a tudi, ¶i widijan a binawr~…ĺan mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuj mir~…ĺakuud tu sauwad nu ¶i kasuwan atu tar~…ĺawadaw, midudu ¶ tu sadipasan majtimur~…ĺan mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw, makatukuńß satu i ¶iwidijan. ¶i widijan a nijadu, a mikiniŇč tu papituwaj a tumuk, patid…ôŇč satu tu ba…ôtu a paja atu sasar~…ĺisidan. **** sabatu a sasar~…ĺisidan war~…ĺu ku ni patid…ôŇč tu tatabakijaj a matu, mabar~…ĺi Ē~ °, mar~…ĺam…ô ¶, r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, matuduńß, kasikad, mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk, madim…ôr~…ĺ, kadińßiji, ina sapitur~…ĺun nama kajda i bujuaj tur~…ĺuwaj a kar~…ĺimu ¶u nu pir~…ĺda ¶ ani pasubana.
S.FORM: sabato kakilimaan i kaliking sohong sapicumud i ci widiyan, sabawcacay ku bangu a dadan, namakaamis tayda i timus ikawanan nu dadan, iayaw nu ciwidiyan a cacudadan, idaw kuni patideng tu salisinan sabatu sapikining tu pituway a tumuk. nilacul ŤĶ∑śļź Baetu u kamu nu Sakizaya, u sasalisin a buyu i sauwad nu sakidaya sabatu han, u imi sa, i sasa nu sauwac tanu batu sa. Sabatu hananay u tatabakiya a baetu masilat, yasasalisinan sabatu u sasalisidan nu ci winiyan a niyadu, u sakidaya a tamdaw masikad tu baetu, u baetu ani'tu patidaku, ina sasalisinan hanu baetuen misilad, u sangaw nu niyadu'ay atu di'tu, patineng tuni simsiman. ŚēüÁĒ®ŚĄÄŚľŹ Sabatu u salisinan nay i tusaay a malbud walu a mihcaan mahamin sangaan, sakidaya i tusa a malbud siway a mihcaan cacay a mulad samaw tu pitu a demiad, misalisin na panganga tusa tu amihcaan atu napatideng tu sasalisinan, uyda a demiad binawlan mipacuk tu tusay a pabu, pasimel tu titi, ina sasalisidan patideng hidan tunu cacay a malbud walu a lasubu pitu a bataan walu a mihcaan nu takumuwan a kawaw(kaliyawan a kawaw) u sakidaya masibek, papina-ay mueneng i kilay a mukelal nu tipan satimulan a tudi, ci widiyan a binawlan maluyaluy milakuud tu sauwad nu ci kasuwan atu talawadaw, miduduc tu sadipasan maytimulan mulaliw, makatukuh satu i ciwidiyan. ci widiyan a niyadu, a mikining tu papituway a tumuk, patideng satu tu baetu a paya atu sasalisidan. ŚÖęť°ÜŚ∑®Áü≥ Sabatu a sasalisidan walu ku ni patideng tu tatabakiyay a matu, mabali', malamec, lecuhan, matuduh, kasikad, malaluk, madimel, kadihiyi, ina sapitulun nama kayda i buyuay tuluway a kalimucu nu pildac ani pasubana.
S.PHON: sabato kakir~…ĺimaan i kar~…ĺikiŇč sońßoŇč sapi ¶umud i ¶i widijan, sabaw ¶a ¶aj ku baŇču a dadan, namakaamis tajda i timus ikawanan nu dadan, iajaw nu ¶iwidijan a ¶a ¶udadan, idaw kuni patid…ôŇč tu sar~…ĺisinan sabatu sapikiniŇč tu pituwaj a tumuk. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ** ba…ôtu u kamu nu sakizaja, u sasar~…ĺisin a buju i sauwad nu sakidaja sabatu ńßan, u imi sa, i sasa nu sauwa ¶ tanu batu sa. sabatu ńßananaj u tatabakija a ba…ôtu masir~…ĺat, jasasar~…ĺisinan sabatu u sasar~…ĺisidan nu ¶i winijan a nijadu, u sakidaja a tamdaw masikad tu ba…ôtu, u ba…ôtu ani Ē~ °tu patidaku, ina sasar~…ĺisinan ńßanu ba…ôtu…ôn misir~…ĺad, u saŇčaw nu nijadu Ē~ °aj atu di Ē~ °tu, patin…ôŇč tuni simsiman. **** sabatu u sar~…ĺisinan naj i tusaaj a mar~…ĺbud war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan mańßamin saŇčaan, sakidaja i tusa a mar~…ĺbud siwaj a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a mur~…ĺad samaw tu pitu a d…ômiad, misar~…ĺisin na paŇčaŇča tusa tu amińß ¶aan atu napatid…ôŇč tu sasar~…ĺisinan, ujda a d…ômiad binawr~…ĺan mipa ¶uk tu tusaj a pabu, pasim…ôr~…ĺ tu titi, ina sasar~…ĺisidan patid…ôŇč ńßidan tunu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺbud war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan nu takumuwan a kawaw(kar~…ĺijawan a kawaw) u sakidaja masib…ôk, papina-aj mu…ôn…ôŇč i kir~…ĺaj a muk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu tipan satimur~…ĺan a tudi, ¶i widijan a binawr~…ĺan mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuj mir~…ĺakuud tu sauwad nu ¶i kasuwan atu tar~…ĺawadaw, midudu ¶ tu sadipasan majtimur~…ĺan mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw, makatukuńß satu i ¶iwidijan. ¶i widijan a nijadu, a mikiniŇč tu papituwaj a tumuk, patid…ôŇč satu tu ba…ôtu a paja atu sasar~…ĺisidan. **** sabatu a sasar~…ĺisidan war~…ĺu ku ni patid…ôŇč tu tatabakijaj a matu, mabar~…ĺi Ē~ °, mar~…ĺam…ô ¶, r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, matuduńß, kasikad, mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk, madim…ôr~…ĺ, kadińßiji, ina sapitur~…ĺun nama kajda i bujuaj tur~…ĺuwaj a kar~…ĺimu ¶u nu pir~…ĺda ¶ ani pasubana.
